These tests use base64-encoded adult visual fixtures.
They are intended for manual integration testing only and should not run in CI.

## Image sources and licenses

This project uses a small number of third-party example images for testing and
demonstration purposes.

- `astronaut.png`  
  Source: `skimage.data.astronaut()` from scikit-image.  
  Original source: NASA Great Images database.  
  License/status: public domain / no known copyright restrictions.  
  Reference: https://scikit-image.org/docs/stable/api/skimage.data.html#skimage.data.astronaut

> [!WARNING] 
> 
> The following images are adult in nature and may not be suitable for all audiences.

- `Archives_d'Éros_Marconi.jpg` 
  Source: Wikimedia Commons.  
  Original source: Archives d'Éros.  
  Author: Gaudenzio Marconi (1842–1885).  
  Date: unknown.  
  License/status: public domain; marked as public domain in the country of
  origin and in countries with a copyright term of life plus 100 years or less,
  and public domain in the United States because it was published before
  January 1, 1930.  
  Reference: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Archives_d%27%C3%89ros_Marconi_02.jpg
  Public domain mark: https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/mark/1.0/
